summary: Independent QA accepts M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 for the scoped systemic-interaction recovery step. Implementation commit 6b793907fc27308a96b7e2d5fd23da8134b6927c synchronizes the task rail, strategic map surface metadata, route queue/district list focus state, and right inspector around a UI-derived active action and active object. Default player mode no longer exposes every legend overlay at once: obligation focus shows current focus, selected supply path, obligation pressure, and settlement, while risk and blocked/capacity overlays are phase- or mode-relevant. The map renderer already filters situation-mode route rendering to selected-district related routes plus non-reachable routes, so the visible low-fidelity map is not an all-lines engineering diagram. Legend copy is player-facing and the new focused tests guard against read-model, debug, command-path, GameCommand, raw-reason, and reason-code wording in the player legend/task surface. The implementation stays inside UI/Web/test paths and preserves command/query/read-model boundaries; no authoritative WorldState mutation path, sim-core/protocol/save/content/Electron change, server, telemetry, manual node battle, final art, or dependency scope was introduced. The cumulative branch contains PROJECT_STATUS.md from the lead start process note outside task allowed_paths, but QA accepts it as a process checkpoint exception because it is not part of the implementation commit and has no product-code or forbidden-package impact.
commit: implementation 6b793907fc27308a96b7e2d5fd23da8134b6927c; writer handoff 70207269817859dfd48c147a7a92afbe95f2b7fb; current branch process head 1b8b526a777f7e234802366a9b229bbcd42adf78 plus systems and QA handoff files

tests_run.result: Before QA handoff write, branch was codex/m7-map-decision-surface-sync with untracked systems review handoff and systems-to-QA route only.
Cumulative tracked branch diff contained UI/Web/test files, allowed project task/message/route/model-state files, and PROJECT_STATUS.md from the lead process note.
Task registry lists M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 as REVIEW/client_engineer; M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED and M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 remains DRAFT.
Ready check exited cleanly with no console output.
Implementation commit notAllowed [] and forbiddenHits []; cumulative branch forbiddenHits [] and notAllowed [PROJECT_STATUS.md] only.

Implementation commit changes only apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.test.tsx, packages/ui/src/i18n.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts, and tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx.
Focused Playwright passed: 1/1 Chromium test. Existing NO_COLOR/FORCE_COLOR warnings only.
Format check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

decisions.decision: Accept the UI-derived ClientDecisionSurfaceFocus and propagated data attributes as presentation/test metadata that synchronizes task cards, map selection, district list, route queue, and inspector without creating authoritative client world state.

Accept the default overlay/legend de-noising because player mode now exposes only phase-relevant legend tones, and situation-mode renderer behavior keeps route rendering selected-district or blocked-route relevant unless the user chooses route mode.

Accept player-facing legend copy for this task. QA observed no new debug, read-model, command-path, GameCommand, raw-reason, or reason-code wording in the player legend or focused decision-surface test path.

Accept the architecture boundary: player actions still submit through existing client command DTO builders and submit callbacks; the implementation introduces no sim-core, protocol, save-format, content-source, Electron, server, telemetry, dependency, or manual-battle changes.

Accept PROJECT_STATUS.md in the cumulative branch as a lead process start checkpoint exception, not an implementation-scope violation. The implementation commit itself stays within allowed paths and no forbidden path is present.

risks.summary: Existing map accessibility roledescription/help copy still contains read-model wording outside the updated legend path.
risks.mitigation: Not accepted as a blocker for this task because the current acceptance target was visible legend/decision-surface synchronization and the legacy text is already covered by pre-existing tests. Recommend a later accessibility-copy cleanup if content lock UX review expands to screen-reader copy.

risks.summary: QA validated DOM state, renderer route-filter behavior, tests, and boundary fit, but did not re-run the full screenshot matrix in this handoff.
risks.mitigation: Writer recorded build:web, storybook:build, and full 28-test e2e evidence; systems reran focused coverage. The next M7 systemic interaction validation should provide the broader UX/screenshot pass before content-lock reconsideration.

requested_action: Lead may treat M7-MAP-DECISION-SURFACE-SYNC-001 as QA accepted after handoff validation and proceed with normal integration/PR CI routing. Do not mark formal M7 content lock accepted from this task alone; it only advances the systemic interaction recovery chain toward M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001.
